criteria_results.description: Minimize toolbox for mobile (remove tools, leave only Save, Export ZIP, Export PDF)
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx hides ToolSelector on mobile (line 25). client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ProjectActions.tsx provides a mobile-specific view (lines 48-81) showing only Save, ZIP, and PDF export buttons. client/src/pages/home.tsx hides sidebars on mobile (lines 42-57).

criteria_results.description: Automatic project save after each loaded photo
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx (line 75) and client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx (line 103) call handleSave(true) immediately after ADD_OBJECT_PHOTO.

criteria_results.description: PM role status change on mobile with enlarged quick access bar
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx includes an isPM check (line 46) and renders a touch-friendly status selection bar (lines 158-196) with h-12 buttons. The main bar height is increased to h-20 (line 101) for better ergonomics.
The restrictive if (isTech) return null; early return has been removed from client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx, allowing Technicians to access photo capture and gallery features.

commit_message.subject: Enhance mobile UI and add auto-save for photos
commit_message.body:
Minimize toolbox on mobile to show only Save, ZIP, and PDF exports.
Implement auto-save after object photo uploads and removals.
Add quick-access status change bar for PMs on mobile.
Enlarge mobile UI elements for better touch ergonomics.
Fix Technician access to object actions on mobile.
